title: Ops Post
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ops Post''' was one of the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|New Republic Scout Service's]] two headquarters, in charge of NRSS' day-to-day operations. Located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Xoemefel]], it covered an area of 20 square kilometers, making it the largest scout base of its era.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''
